chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-178 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. ------ 10.07.2025 Petitioners, present in person. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w SIP Muhammad Khan Brohi, S.H.O. P.S. Baqa Muhammad Jakhrani, Jacobabad. ------ The S.H.O. P.S. Baqa Muhammad Jakhrani, present files statement dated 10.07.2025, taken on record. The petitioner as well as alleged detenue Fareeda submit that the purpose of instant petition has been served; hence they do not want to linger on it anymore and seek its disposal, which is not opposed by learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh and Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. Order accordingly. Judge Manzoor
